ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the program */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree offered (e.g., B.tech, M.B.B.S) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch of the program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "level" TEXT /* Academic level (UG, PG) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the program (e.g., accredited, pending) */,
  "accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest accreditation */,
  "curriculum_version" TEXT /* Version of the current curriculum */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was last approved */,
  "program_head" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member responsible for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_head FOREIGN KEY ("program_head") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing the category */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review of the category */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the branch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "accreditation_body" TEXT /* Name of the body that accredits the branch */,
  "accreditation_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the accreditation */,
  "branch_head" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member responsible for the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_branch_head FOREIGN KEY ("branch_head") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "minimum_duration" TEXT /* Minimum duration required for the level */,
  "maximum_duration" TEXT /* Maximum duration allowed for the level */,
  "credit_requirements" TEXT /* Total credits required to complete the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the institution */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or text field listing the user's permissions */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the program */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
